hero.subtitle: Where innovation meets precision. The premier gathering of plastic and reconstructive surgery professionals in the Baltics.

speakers.name: Prof. Elise Bergström
speakers.title: Chair of Aesthetic Surgery, Karolinska Institute

speakers.name: Dr. Alessio Marchetti
speakers.title: Director, Milan Institute of Reconstructive Medicine

speakers.name: Dr. Yuna Park
speakers.title: Pioneer in Minimally Invasive Technique, Seoul

speakers.name: Prof. James Whitfield
speakers.title: Head of Craniofacial Surgery, Johns Hopkins

tracks.name: Facial Aesthetics
tracks.description: Rhinoplasty advances, non-surgical rejuvenation, fat grafting, and facial harmony — from consultation to long-term outcomes.

tracks.name: Regenerative Medicine
tracks.description: Stem cell therapy, tissue engineering, PRP protocols, and the frontier of biological reconstruction in clinical practice.

tracks.name: Body Contouring
tracks.description: High-definition liposculpture, post-bariatric reconstruction, and the integration of energy-based devices in body aesthetics.

tracks.name: Digital Surgery
tracks.description: AI-assisted surgical planning, 3D simulation, robotic technique, and the digital transformation of aesthetic practice.

tracks.name: Breast Surgery
tracks.description: Oncoplastic innovation, implant evolution, autologous reconstruction, and patient-centered decision frameworks.

tracks.name: Ethics & Safety
tracks.description: Patient consent, complication management, social media responsibility, and the evolving ethical landscape of cosmetic surgery.

testimonials.quote: KPSM is where the real conversations happen. The masterclasses alone justified the trip — but the hallway discussions between sessions were equally transformative for my practice.
testimonials.name: Dr. Sofia Reyes

testimonials.quote: The digital surgery track opened my eyes to possibilities I had not considered. I returned home and completely restructured my pre-operative workflow using the 3D planning tools presented.
testimonials.name: Dr. Raj Patel

testimonials.quote: As an early-career surgeon, the mentorship programme at KPSM connected me with leaders who have genuinely shaped my trajectory. The calibre of faculty is unmatched.
testimonials.name: Dr. Lina Hoffmann

venue.title: Kaunas, Lithuania
venue.description: Lithuania's second city and a European Capital of Culture. A vibrant centre of modernist architecture, medical innovation, and warm Baltic hospitality.
venue.transport: Direct flights from major EU hubs

cta.heading: Join us in Kaunas
cta.description: Early registration is now open. Includes full meeting access, digital proceedings, welcome reception, and conference dinner.

footer.brand_text: The premier plastic and reconstructive surgery meeting in the Baltics. Kaunas, Lithuania.
